/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX13.1.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=12.7 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/prologix_emulator.dir/src/Commander.cpp.o CMakeFiles/prologix_emulator.dir/src/Functions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/prologix_emulator.dir/src/Parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/prologix_emulator.dir/src/Responder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/prologix_emulator.dir/src/TCPServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/prologix_emulator.dir/src/TCPSession.cpp.o CMakeFiles/prologix_emulator.dir/src/UDPServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/prologix_emulator.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/prologix_emulator.dir/src/ClientList.cpp.o -o binary/prologix_emulator  _deps/ftxui-build/libftxui-component.a _deps/ftxui-build/libftxui-screen.a _deps/ftxui-build/libftxui-dom.a _deps/ftxui-build/libftxui-screen.a _deps/boost-build/libs/coroutine/libboost_coroutine.a _deps/boost-build/libs/context/libboost_context.a _deps/boost-build/libs/date_time/libboost_date_time.a _deps/boost-build/libs/exception/libboost_exception.a _deps/boost-build/libs/container/libboost_container.a
